title: ziziphus leucodermis
intro: Ziziphus leucodermis, also known as the jujube tree, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to the Himalayan region. The jujube tree has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Ziziphus leucodermis include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the jujube fruit is often dried and used as a tea or made into a powder, while the bark and roots are used to make decoctions and infusions.
